---
title: "Mathematical Statistics: Inference, Estimation, and Testing"
subtitle: "Core Mathematics — Year 1"
date: "2025-01-01"
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
number-sections: true
---

# Mathematical Statistics: Inference, Estimation, and Testing

**Track**: Core Mathematics — Year 1

The rigorous theory of statistical inference. Provides the mathematical foundations for every data-facing component of the curriculum: parameter estimation, hypothesis testing, model selection, and the asymptotic theory that justifies practical methods.

## Table of Contents

1. Statistical Models and Sufficiency
2. Point Estimation Theory
3. Hypothesis Testing
4. Confidence Regions and Interval Estimation
5. Asymptotic Theory
6. Decision Theory
7. Nonparametric and Robust Methods
8. Information-Theoretic Model Selection

---

## Chapter 1: Statistical Models and Sufficiency

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 2: Point Estimation Theory

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 3: Hypothesis Testing

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 4: Confidence Regions and Interval Estimation

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 5: Asymptotic Theory

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 6: Decision Theory

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 7: Nonparametric and Robust Methods

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 8: Information-Theoretic Model Selection

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*
